# InstallDnfPackage

Install packages on RHEL-family nodes with dnf.

## Summary

- kind: `InstallDnfPackage`
- phase: `apply`
- group: Packages and Repositories

## When To Use

Use this during apply when the workflow targets RHEL, Rocky, Fedora, or compatible hosts and needs dnf-specific install behavior.

## Example

```yaml
kind: InstallDnfPackage
spec:
  packages: [kubelet, kubeadm, kubectl]
  restrictToRepos: [offline-kubernetes]
  dnf:
    skipBroken: true
```

## Spec Fields

| Key | Type | Required | Default | Enum | Description | Example |
|---|---|---:|---|---|---|---|
| `spec.dnf` | `object` | no | `` | `` | Dnf-specific installation options. | `{skipBroken:true,allowErasing:true}` |
| `spec.excludeRepos` | `array<string>` | no | `` | `` | Dnf repository IDs to exclude from package resolution. | `[updates]` |
| `spec.packages` | `array<string>` | yes | `` | `` | Package names to install. | `[kubelet,kubeadm,kubectl]` |
| `spec.restrictToRepos` | `array<string>` | no | `` | `` | Limit dnf visibility to these repository IDs. | `[offline-kubernetes]` |
| `spec.source` | `object` | no | `` | `` | Local repository source used for the installation. | `{type:local-repo,path:/opt/deck/repos/kubernetes}` |

## Nested Objects

### `spec.dnf`

| Key | Type | Required | Default | Enum | Description | Example |
|---|---|---:|---|---|---|---|
| `spec.dnf.allowErasing` | `boolean` | no | `` | `` | Allow erasing installed packages to resolve dependencies. | `true` |
| `spec.dnf.best` | `boolean` | no | `` | `` | Prefer best available versions. Omit to use the distribution default. | `false` |
| `spec.dnf.cacheOnly` | `boolean` | no | `` | `` | Use only cached metadata and packages. | `true` |
| `spec.dnf.disableGpgCheck` | `boolean` | no | `` | `` | Disable GPG signature checking for this transaction. | `true` |
| `spec.dnf.excludePackages` | `array<string>` | no | `` | `` | Package name patterns to exclude from the transaction. | `[kernel*]` |
| `spec.dnf.installWeakDeps` | `boolean` | no | `` | `` | Install weak dependencies. Omit to use the distribution default. | `false` |
| `spec.dnf.skipBroken` | `boolean` | no | `` | `` | Skip unavailable packages or packages with broken dependencies. | `true` |

### `spec.source`

| Key | Type | Required | Default | Enum | Description | Example |
|---|---|---:|---|---|---|---|
| `spec.source.path` | `string` | yes | `` | `` | Filesystem path to the pre-prepared local package repository. | `/opt/deck/repos/kubernetes` |
| `spec.source.type` | `string` | yes | `` | `` | Source type. Currently only `local-repo` is supported. | `local-repo` |


## Notes

- Use `InstallDnfPackage` when the workflow intentionally targets RHEL-family hosts.
- Use `InstallPackage` with `manager: auto` for portable workflows.
